india_trends.title: Stock Market Holiday: NSE, BSE to remain shut one day this week. Check upcoming market holidays

india_trends.title: Expect India to be largest market by passenger volume by 2030 for FlixBus: Co official
india_trends.summary: Global travel firm FlixBus anticipates India will be its largest market by passenger volume by 2030. The company entered India in February 2024, offering intercity bus services. FlixBus plans significant expansion, targeting a 30 percent network growth this summer. India's vast market and improved h

india_trends.title: IDFC First Bank Q4 profit up 5% on lower provisions; fraud hits ops 42%
india_trends.summary: IDFC First Bank reported a modest 5% rise in Q4 net profit, aided by a 40% decline in provisions. However, a Rs 645-crore fraud at its Chandigarh branch sharply dented operating performance, leading to a 42% drop in operating profit after the bank fully expensed the impact during the quarter.

india_trends.title: Adani Green to invest Rs 15,000 crore to add 10 GWh battery storage in FY27
india_trends.summary: Adani Green Energy is investing Rs 15,000 crore to add over 10 gigawatt-hours of battery storage this financial year. This move supports India's energy transition by ensuring reliable clean power. The company is building this storage alongside its renewable energy park in Khavda, Gujarat. This expan

india_trends.title: Telecom operators’ body urges govt to cut spectrum prices ahead of auction, cites weak 5G returns
india_trends.summary: The telecom industry body COAI has asked the government to reduce spectrum auction prices. This comes as service providers have not yet recovered their large investments in 5G infrastructure. COAI believes the government should consider the significant capital infusion made by operators. They hope f

india_trends.title: Uco Bank Q4 profit jumps 23% on lower provisions; margins dip
india_trends.summary: State-owned Uco Bank reported a 23% rise in Q4 net profit to Rs 801 crore, aided by lower provisions, though operating profit declined due to weaker core and non-interest income. Net interest margin slipped to 3%, even as advances grew 19.4% and deposits rose 11.6%.

india_trends.title: Marriott bullish on India expansion plans, bets on spiritual tourism
india_trends.summary: Marriott International is aggressively expanding in India with 200 hotels in its pipeline, aiming to open around 50 this year. Despite near-term international travel disruptions from the West Asia crisis, the hospitality giant remains committed to its long-term growth strategy in the country.

india_trends.title: US Fed set to hold rates steady again on cost hikes from Mideast war
india_trends.summary: The US central bank is widely expected to keep interest rates unchanged at its policy meeting next week, as energy prices stay high and supply chains snarled due to war in the Middle East.

india_trends.summary: India is boosting Russian oil imports and reviving supplies from Africa, Iran, and Venezuela. This strategy aims to fill a crude oil gap caused by Middle East disruptions. india_trends.summary: Nissan Motor Co. is counting on China to reverse its fortunes after headwinds in the US and Japan left the carmaker searching for a way to regain its footing.
